notionDbs.name: Backlog A (User Stories / Backlog)
notionDbs.notes: Active; 380 pages edited in last 30 days. CHG records here are sparse (2 CHG pages); most CHGs live in Archive C.

notionDbs.name: Auto-Heal B
notionDbs.notes: 169 open items; none edited in last 30 days. May indicate Auto-Heal DB is not receiving new 'needs_ken' items or type field is unset (all Type=Unknown).

notionDbs.name: Archive C
notionDbs.notes: Archive C holds 612 typed records; 558 are CHG pages. 346 pages edited in last 30 days.

akbSync.notes: Local AKB mirror is current with Notion. state/akb-pages/ contains 598 exports.

pgFindings.issue: 273 CHGs exist in PG state_changes but are missing from Notion Archive C
pgFindings.evidence: PG has 827 CHG rows. Notion Archive C has 558 CHG pages. Missing set includes early CHGs CHG-0001 through ~CHG-0272 plus anomaly IDs CHG-273, CHG-274, CHG-275, CHG-ARCHIVE-20260521-1.
pgFindings.suggestedAction: Backfill missing CHGs to Notion Archive C in batches. Start with any CHG referenced in current docs/processes; early historical CHGs can be batched lower priority.

pgFindings.issue: Pending state_notion_sync audit entry from 2026-06-04 unresolved for 35 days
pgFindings.evidence: SELECT * FROM state_notion_sync ORDER BY last_sync_at DESC shows row id=345d6087..., sync_type=audit, status=pending, last_sync_at='2026-06-04 10:00:00+10', issues={}.
pgFindings.suggestedAction: Resolve or close the pending audit sync record. Determine expected outcome and update status to complete/cancelled with notes.

pgFindings.issue: PG agent_registry updated_at is 47 days stale for all 14 agents
pgFindings.evidence: All 14 rows show updated_at='2026-05-23 19:25:32.439276+10'. Agent capabilities/model preferences may have changed since then.
pgFindings.suggestedAction: Update agent_registry updated_at when agent configs change, or run a reconciliation script to refresh timestamps and validate capabilities against SOUL/AGENTS.

pgFindings.issue: Content Calendar database ID in memory/shared/notion.md returns 404
pgFindings.evidence: GET /v1/pages/07b6afaf-da51-4f0e-bb0c-6d37f3b78149 returns HTTP 404. Other page/DB IDs in notion.md resolved successfully.
pgFindings.suggestedAction: Find current Content Calendar DB ID (if it still exists) or remove/update the stale reference in memory/shared/notion.md and any skills that reference it.

pgFindings.issue: Auto-Heal B has 169 open items but zero edits in last 30 days and no Type values set
pgFindings.evidence: Notion query returned 169 pages all with status=Open and Type=Unknown; last_30d=0.
pgFindings.suggestedAction: Verify whether auto-heal 'needs_ken' items are being written to this DB. If not, fix the auto-heal → Notion integration or archive stale entries.
